title: Traffic officer's vehicle hit by brick on N2
bodyText:
GEORGE NEWS - Thembalethu police are investigating an attempted murder after a provincial traffic officer's service vehicle was hit by a concrete brick while she was traveling along the N2 on Sunday 28 April at about 05:15.

The brick struck her vehicle's windscreen while she was driving under the footbridge between Thembalethu and Lawaaikamp and landed on the passenger seat.


> The 43-year-old traffic official sustained injuries to her face and was taken to hospital.


No arrests have been made. Anyone with information is asked to contact the investigating officer, WO Esmerelda Jackson on 044 802 8900 or 079 894 1576. ‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’
